page: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-88 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with the x86_64 architecture. It features 88 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped to 44 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system operates at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz and includes a cache hierarchy consisting of 48 KB L1d, 2 MB L2, and 105 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 704.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type, and it includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong multi-core capabilities and memory throughput. The server achieves top 25% performance in multi-core stress-ng tests, PassMark CPU evaluations, and Geekbench multi-core workloads. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, scoring in the top 25% for both small-block cached reads and large-block uncached read/write operations. Single-core performance, however, remains in the middle 50% across stress-ng, Geekbench, and single-threaded compression tests. Advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions are present, contributing to top 10% performance in Geekbench image processing and top 25% in PassMark extended instructions.

Given its high memory density and strong multi-threaded performance, this instance is suited for memory-intensive workloads such as database operations, where it scores in the top 25% in PassMark database benchmarks and Redis SET operations. It also demonstrates strong capability in processing prompts for large language models, though text generation speeds for larger models fall into the middle 50% category. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the lack of local storage and GPUs positions this instance as a dedicated resource for high-density memory processing and enterprise database hosting without the overhead of specialized accelerator hardware.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-88 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 88 dedicated vCPUs and 704.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz, it includes 105 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. While single-core benchmarks place it in the average tier, its multi-core and memory bandwidth performance rank in the top 25%. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, making it a specialized resource for memory-intensive tasks. The platform's hardware configuration delivers strong performance in database operations and multi-threaded decompression, balancing high memory capacity with robust parallel processing capabilities.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-88 is a memory-optimized instance with 88 vCPUs, 704 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, delivering strong multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-88 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 88 vCPUs, 704 GB RAM, and Intel Xeon processors.
tagline: A high-density memory instance featuring eighty-eight dedicated vCPUs and advanced matrix extensions for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Features 88 dedicated vCPUs and 704 GB of RAM
Powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processor with AVX-512 and AMX support
Delivers top 25% multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suited for enterprise databases, Redis, and memory-heavy workloads
